name: TrueNAS
author: IDKMANAGER
description: Monitors and controls one or more TrueNAS SCALE instances from the PegaProx panel (TrueCommand-style): pools/disks health, resilver/scrub progress, datasets, snapshots, shares, replication and apps/VMs over the JSON-RPC 2.0 WebSocket API. F0: installable skeleton with a persistent, reconnecting WS client and multi-instance config; monitoring/write features land in later phases.
